requirement_topic.en: DES Grid-Connection Approval — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), Grid Parameters (50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V), and DES Technical Review
requirement_topic.zh: DES并网批准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、电网参数（50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V）及DES技术审查
requirement_topic.zht: DES併網批准——防孤島（IEC 62116）、電網參數（50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V）及DES技術審查

summary.en: Brunei's electricity grid is operated principally by DES (Department of Electrical Services) under the Ministry of Energy, with BPC (Berakas Power Company) also operating generation and distribution in parts of the country. The grid operates at 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. For grid-connected solar PV inverters, DES connection approval is required before commissioning. Published PV-specific grid interconnection technical codes are limited in Brunei; requirements are typically confirmed through the DES project application and technical review process. IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance is the international baseline expected for grid-tied PV inverters operating on the 50 Hz Brunei grid. Inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be set for 230/400 V, 50 Hz — not the 220/380 V parameters used in China under GB/T 156. NOTE: Brunei's formal published PV interconnection code may be limited or project-specific; exporters must confirm current DES technical requirements directly. The Tenaga Suria Brunei pilot project has demonstrated initial utility-scale solar in Brunei, but distributed rooftop grid-connection rules are not comprehensively published.
summary.zh: 文莱电网主要由能源部下属的DES（电力服务部）运营，BPC（贝拉卡斯电力公司）也在部分地区经营发电和配电业务。电网运行参数为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。并网太阳能光伏逆变器须在调试前取得DES并网批准。文莱已发布的光伏专项并网技术规范较为有限，要求通常通过DES项目申请和技术审查程序确认。IEC 62116防孤岛合规是在文莱50 Hz电网运行的并网光伏逆变器的国际基准期望。逆变器固件保护阈值和重连延迟须设置为230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中国依据GB/T 156使用的220/380 V参数。注：文莱正式发布的光伏并网规范可能较为有限或为项目专属；出口商须直接向DES确认现行技术要求。Tenaga Suria文莱试点项目已展示文莱初步的大型光伏应用，但分布式屋顶并网规则尚未全面发布。
summary.zht: 汶萊電網主要由能源部下屬的DES（電力服務部）運營，BPC（貝拉卡斯電力公司）也在部分地區經營發電和配電業務。電網運行參數為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。併網太陽能光伏逆變器須在調試前取得DES併網批准。汶萊已發佈的光伏專項併網技術規範較為有限，要求通常通過DES項目申請和技術審查程序確認。IEC 62116防孤島合規是在汶萊50 Hz電網運行的併網光伏逆變器的國際基準期望。逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須設置為230/400 V、50 Hz，而非中國依據GB/T 156使用的220/380 V參數。注：汶萊正式發佈的光伏併網規範可能較為有限或為項目專屬；出口商須直接向DES確認現行技術要求。Tenaga Suria汶萊試點項目已展示汶萊初步的大型光伏應用，但分散式屋頂併網規則尚未全面發佈。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (international baseline for 50 Hz grid-tied PV inverters)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (applicable to grid-connection characteristics)
DES (Department of Electrical Services, Brunei) — grid-connection application and technical approval process (project-specific; not fully published)
Brunei Electricity Act (Cap. 74) — legal framework for electricity supply and connection in Brunei (unconfirmed whether specific PV regulations are enacted under this or subsidiary legislation)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. These documents are based on China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid parameters (GB/T 156) and cannot be submitted as DES Brunei grid-connection evidence. The 10 V difference in nominal voltage between China's grid (220/380 V) and Brunei's grid (230/400 V) at 50 Hz requires firmware revalidation; protection relay thresholds calibrated for 220/380 V may not perform correctly at Brunei's 230/400 V nominal voltage.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及中国电网条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述文件基于中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网参数（GB/T 156），不能作为文莱DES并网证据提交。中国电网（220/380 V）与文莱电网（230/400 V）在50 Hz下标称电压相差10 V，需重新验证固件；针对220/380 V校准的保护继电器阈值在文莱230/400 V标称电压下可能无法正确运行。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及中國電網條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。上述文件基於中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網參數（GB/T 156），不能作為汶萊DES併網證據提交。中國電網（220/380 V）與汶萊電網（230/400 V）在50 Hz下標稱電壓相差10 V，需重新驗證韌體；針對220/380 V校準的保護繼電器閾值在汶萊230/400 V標稱電壓下可能無法正確運行。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China domestic: 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy DES Brunei grid-connection requirements. Exporters must: (a) apply to DES directly for grid-connection approval for the specific project; (b) confirm DES technical requirements for the inverter model, including any required test evidence (IEC 62116 anti-islanding is the international baseline); (c) revalidate inverter firmware protection thresholds for Brunei's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not China's 220/380 V; (d) document any re-parameterisation and, where the change is material, re-test under applicable IEC standards. Brunei's published PV interconnection code is limited; treat DES as the authoritative gate and obtain written technical requirements from DES before finalising the equipment compliance package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足文莱DES并网要求。出口商须：（a）就具体项目直接向DES申请并网批准；（b）确认逆变器型号的DES技术要求，包括所需测试证据（IEC 62116防孤岛为国际基准）；（c）针对文莱230/400 V、50 Hz电网重新验证逆变器固件保护阈值——而非中国220/380 V；（d）记录任何重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。文莱已发布的光伏并网规范较为有限；应将DES视为权威审批门槛，在最终确定设备合规包前向DES取得书面技术要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足汶萊DES併網要求。出口商須：（a）就具體項目直接向DES申請併網批准；（b）確認逆變器型號的DES技術要求，包括所需測試證據（IEC 62116防孤島為國際基準）；（c）針對汶萊230/400 V、50 Hz電網重新驗證逆變器韌體保護閾值——而非中國220/380 V；（d）記錄任何重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。汶萊已發佈的光伏併網規範較為有限；應將DES視為權威審批門檻，在最終確定設備合規包前向DES取得書面技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DES connection approval is required for grid-connected PV installations in Brunei; IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance is the expected international baseline; specific documentary requirements must be confirmed with DES as published PV-specific codes are limited
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements under domestic GB/T standards but is not accepted by DES Brunei as grid-connection evidence

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Energy, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DES Brunei grid-connection approval is a mandatory gate for grid-tied PV inverters. Brunei's published PV-specific interconnection code is limited — confirm DES documentary requirements directly before finalising the equipment compliance package. Revalidate inverter firmware for 230/400 V, 50 Hz (not China's 220/380 V). Chinese GB/T grid certificates are not accepted as DES connection evidence. Source URL verified as DES homepage only; specific PV connection requirements and application procedures must be confirmed directly with DES.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱DES并网批准是并网光伏逆变器的强制性审批门槛。文莱已发布的光伏专项并网规范较为有限——在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向DES确认文件要求。逆变器固件须重新验证为230/400 V、50 Hz（而非中国220/380 V）。中国GB/T并网证书不被接受为DES并网证据。来源URL仅验证为DES主页；具体光伏并网要求和申请程序须直接向DES确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊DES併網批准是併網光伏逆變器的強制性審批門檻。汶萊已發佈的光伏專項併網規範較為有限——在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向DES確認文件要求。逆變器韌體須重新驗證為230/400 V、50 Hz（而非中國220/380 V）。中國GB/T併網證書不被接受為DES併網證據。來源URL僅驗證為DES主頁；具體光伏併網要求和申請程序須直接向DES確認。

requirement_topic.en: Brunei Distributed Solar — Tenaga Suria Brunei Context, AEMTS Policy, and Rooftop PV Grid-Connection Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 文莱分布式太阳能——Tenaga Suria文莱背景、AEMTS政策及屋顶光伏并网规则
requirement_topic.zht: 汶萊分散式太陽能——Tenaga Suria汶萊背景、AEMTS政策及屋頂光伏併網規則

summary.en: Brunei's solar PV sector is nascent. The country is an oil-and-gas-rich state with heavily subsidised electricity and very high per-capita consumption, which has historically limited the commercial incentive for distributed solar. The Tenaga Suria Brunei project (a utility-scale solar initiative involving the government) represents the main publicly known PV development. Distributed rooftop solar grid-connection rules are not comprehensively published. The Energy Department (AEMTS) under the Ministry of Energy sets broader energy policy, including Brunei's target to increase renewable energy as part of its national energy strategy (Brunei National Development Plan / Wawasan 2035). For any solar PV grid-connection project in Brunei, the pathway is: (1) engage AEMTS for policy context and any renewable energy programme eligibility; (2) apply to DES for technical connection approval; (3) BPC may be involved for projects in BPC's service area. There is no published equivalent to Qatar's Be Solar or a formal distributed solar net-metering programme as of the last verified date. Confirm current programme status directly with AEMTS and DES.
summary.zh: 文莱太阳能光伏行业仍处于起步阶段。该国是石油和天然气资源丰富的国家，电力大幅补贴，人均用电量极高，这在历史上限制了分布式太阳能的商业动力。Tenaga Suria文莱项目（政府参与的大型光伏项目）是最主要的公开光伏开发案例。分布式屋顶太阳能并网规则尚未全面发布。能源部下属的能源局（AEMTS）制定更广泛的能源政策，包括文莱在国家能源战略（文莱国家发展计划/2035宏愿）框架下提高可再生能源占比的目标。文莱任何太阳能光伏并网项目的路径为：（1）联系AEMTS了解政策背景及任何可再生能源计划资格；（2）向DES申请技术并网批准；（3）BPC服务区内的项目可能涉及BPC。截至最近核实日期，尚无与卡塔尔Be Solar等同的计划或正式的分布式太阳能净电量计量计划。请直接向AEMTS和DES确认当前计划状态。
summary.zht: 汶萊太陽能光伏行業仍處於起步階段。該國是石油和天然氣資源豐富的國家，電力大幅補貼，人均用電量極高，這在歷史上限制了分散式太陽能的商業動力。Tenaga Suria汶萊項目（政府參與的大型光伏項目）是最主要的公開光伏開發案例。分散式屋頂太陽能併網規則尚未全面發佈。能源部下屬的能源局（AEMTS）制定更廣泛的能源政策，包括汶萊在國家能源戰略（汶萊國家發展計劃/2035宏願）框架下提高可再生能源佔比的目標。汶萊任何太陽能光伏併網項目的路徑為：（1）聯繫AEMTS了解政策背景及任何可再生能源計劃資格；（2）向DES申請技術併網批准；（3）BPC服務區內的項目可能涉及BPC。截至最近核實日期，尚無與卡達Be Solar等同的計劃或正式的分散式太陽能淨電量計量計劃。請直接向AEMTS和DES確認當前計劃狀態。

standards_or_laws: AEMTS (Energy Department, Ministry of Energy, Brunei) — national energy policy and renewable energy programme authority (unconfirmed whether formal distributed PV programme is operational as of 2026-06-14)
DES (Department of Electrical Services) — technical connection authority for grid-connected PV
BPC (Berakas Power Company) — grid operator in parts of Brunei; connection rules for BPC service area to be confirmed separately with BPC
Brunei Wawasan 2035 — national development vision including energy diversification goals

summary.en: China has a comprehensive national distributed solar programme, including NEA (National Energy Administration) distributed PV policies, net-metering and feed-in tariff mechanisms (self-consumption with surplus to grid), and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) distributed connection rules referencing NB/T 32004 and GB/T 37408. These Chinese distributed solar policies and connection approvals are entirely domestic and do not transfer to Brunei. Brunei does not have a published equivalent distributed solar programme with clear published technical connection rules.
summary.zh: 中国拥有全面的国家分布式太阳能计划，包括国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策、净电量计量和上网电价机制（自用余电上网）以及引用NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408的电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）分布式并网规则。上述中国分布式太阳能政策和并网批准完全属于国内范畴，不适用于文莱。文莱尚未发布具有明确技术并网规则的同类分布式太阳能计划。
summary.zht: 中國擁有全面的國家分散式太陽能計劃，包括國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策、淨電量計量和上網電價機制（自用餘電上網）以及引用NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408的電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）分散式併網規則。上述中國分散式太陽能政策和併網批准完全屬於國內範疇，不適用於汶萊。汶萊尚未發佈具有明確技術併網規則的同類分散式太陽能計劃。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: There is no published Brunei distributed solar programme equivalent to Qatar Be Solar. Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are irrelevant to Brunei. For any PV project in Brunei: (a) engage AEMTS to determine renewable energy programme eligibility and applicable policy framework; (b) apply to DES for technical connection approval; (c) for projects in BPC's service area, confirm BPC connection requirements separately. Do not assume a published net-metering or feed-in programme exists — confirm current status directly with AEMTS and DES before designing the project commercial model.
gap.zh: 差距：文莱尚无与卡塔尔Be Solar等同的已发布分布式太阳能计划。中国分布式太阳能并网批准与文莱无关。文莱任何光伏项目须：（a）联系AEMTS确定可再生能源计划资格及适用政策框架；（b）向DES申请技术并网批准；（c）BPC服务区内的项目须单独向BPC确认并网要求。不可假设存在已发布的净电量计量或上网电价计划——在设计项目商业模式前，请直接向AEMTS和DES确认当前状态。
gap.zht: 差距：汶萊尚無與卡達Be Solar等同的已發佈分散式太陽能計劃。中國分散式太陽能併網批准與汶萊無關。汶萊任何光伏項目須：（a）聯繫AEMTS確定可再生能源計劃資格及適用政策框架；（b）向DES申請技術併網批准；（c）BPC服務區內的項目須單獨向BPC確認併網要求。不可假設存在已發佈的淨電量計量或上網電價計劃——在設計項目商業模式前，請直接向AEMTS和DES確認當前狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to obtain DES connection approval for any grid-tied PV installation; AEMTS engagement required for renewable energy policy alignment; no confirmed published distributed solar programme with open application process as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed solar connection approvals are granted under China NEA policy and domestic grid operator rules — entirely inapplicable to Brunei

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy, Brunei Darussalam (AEMTS / Energy Department)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei does not have a comprehensively published distributed solar grid-connection programme. Chinese distributed solar approvals are not transferable. Contact AEMTS (Ministry of Energy) for renewable energy policy and programme eligibility, and DES for technical connection approval, before committing equipment to any Brunei PV project. Source URL verified as Ministry of Energy homepage only; specific PV programme details and application processes are unconfirmed and must be verified directly with AEMTS and DES.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱尚未发布全面的分布式太阳能并网计划。中国分布式太阳能批准不可转移。在将设备用于文莱任何光伏项目前，请联系AEMTS（能源部）了解可再生能源政策和计划资格，并联系DES获取技术并网批准。来源URL仅验证为能源部主页；具体光伏计划详情和申请程序未经确认，须直接向AEMTS和DES核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊尚未發佈全面的分散式太陽能併網計劃。中國分散式太陽能批准不可轉移。在將設備用於汶萊任何光伏項目前，請聯繫AEMTS（能源部）了解可再生能源政策和計劃資格，並聯繫DES取得技術併網批准。來源URL僅驗證為能源部主頁；具體光伏計劃詳情和申請程序未經確認，須直接向AEMTS和DES核實。
